message: ci: install zig in build workflows

files.patch:
@@ -75,7 +75,7 @@ jobs:
           fi
           
           # Update Homebrew and install all tools in one command
-          if brew update && brew install swiftlint swiftformat xcbeautify; then
+          if brew update && brew install swiftlint swiftformat xcbeautify zig; then
             echo "Successfully installed/upgraded all tools"
             break
           else
@@ -236,4 +236,4 @@ jobs:
             body: `The nightly release build failed. Please check the [workflow run](${context.serverUrl}/${context.repo.owner}/${context.repo.repo}/actions/runs/${context.runId}) for details.`,
             labels: ['ci', 'nightly-build']
           });
-          console.log(`Created issue #${issue.data.number}`);
\ No newline at end of file
+          console.log(`Created issue #${issue.data.number}`);

@@ -33,7 +33,7 @@ jobs:
     - name: Install system dependencies
       run: |
         sudo apt-get update
-        sudo apt-get install -y libpam0g-dev
+        sudo apt-get install -y libpam0g-dev zig
 
     - name: Cache TypeScript build info
       uses: useblacksmith/cache@v5
@@ -342,4 +342,4 @@ jobs:
         if [ "${{ steps.results.outputs.overall_result }}" = "failure" ]; then
           echo "::error::One or more checks failed"
           exit 1
-        fi
\ No newline at end of file
+        fi

@@ -44,7 +44,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install system dependencies
         run: |
           sudo apt-get update
-          sudo apt-get install -y libpam0g-dev build-essential python3 make g++
+          sudo apt-get install -y libpam0g-dev build-essential python3 make g++ zig
 
       - name: Install dependencies
         run: pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
@@ -127,4 +127,4 @@ jobs:
           
           # Clean up
           kill $SERVER_PID
-          echo "✅ All tests passed!"
\ No newline at end of file
+          echo "✅ All tests passed!"

@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install system dependencies
         run: |
           sudo apt-get update
-          sudo apt-get install -y libpam0g-dev xvfb
+          sudo apt-get install -y libpam0g-dev xvfb zig
           
       - name: Install dependencies
         working-directory: ./web
@@ -119,4 +119,4 @@ jobs:
         with:
           name: playwright-videos
           path: web/test-results/
-          retention-days: 7
\ No newline at end of file
+          retention-days: 7

@@ -43,7 +43,7 @@ jobs:
       - name: Install system dependencies
         run: |
           sudo apt-get update

+          sudo apt-get install -y libpam0g-dev zig
 
       - name: Install dependencies

@@ -152,4 +152,3 @@ jobs:
           name: server-coverage-report
